title: Brodie Lee Jr. wins first singles match at GCW Joey Janela’s Spring Break X
summary: Brodie Lee Jr. wrestled his first singles match on Friday. The match took place at GCW Joey Janela’s Spring Break X at the Horseshoe in Las Vegas. He defeated Joey Janela in the main event of the show. This was the 14-year-old’s second-ever match. He also won the Clusterf— Battle Royal in Las Vegas during […]

title: The Sandman wrestles his final match at GCW Joey Janela’s Spring Break X
summary: The Sandman’s in-ring career is over. It came to an end at GCW Joey Janela’s Spring Break X, where he lost to The Invisible Man. Bill Alphonso served as manager for Sandman’s invisible opponent. The match also featured run-ins and interference from Missy Hyatt, Richard Holliday, JCW’s Zombie stable The Outbreak, Vampiro, Violent J, 2 […]
